2026-05-07NRCanada Revenue Agency ActReappointment of a director of the Board of Management of the Canada Revenue AgencyReappointment of Barbara Carra of Calgary, Alberta, as a director of the Board of Management of the Canada Revenue Agency, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a director of the Board of Management of the Canada Revenue Agency
precis: Reappointment of Barbara Carra of Calgary, Alberta, as a director of the Board of Management of the Canada Revenue Agency, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.
